title: trigonochilum scabiosum
intro: Trigonochilum scabiosum is a type of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Trigonochilum scabiosum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues. Trigonochilum scabiosum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
